Private Alpha

Your relationships, managed through chat

Perch is a lightweight CRM built for professionals who want to stay on top of their network — without the overhead of traditional CRM systems.

Try the demo Get access
Perch

How it works

1
Type naturally — "Had coffee with Anna from Bakery Jensen about their new website"
2
Perch extracts the contact, organization, type, and notes automatically
3
Your network stays organized without any manual data entry

"Had coffee with Anna from Bakery Jensen about their new website"

Features

Chat interface

Add contacts, log meetings, and search your network — all through natural language.

Relations & Organizations

Contact cards with flexible many-to-many links between people and organizations.

Contact moments

Track calls, emails, meetings, coffees — with dates, notes, and follow-ups.

Smart tagging

Categorize and filter your network with flexible tags.

Mobile-first

Chat-first on mobile, split-view on desktop. Optimized for on-the-go use.

Multi-tenant

Separate environments per team or project, with role-based access.

Perch in actie

Automatische bedrijfsinformatie via chat
Relaties opzoeken en beheren
Follow-up acties vastleggen
Organisaties met gekoppelde relaties
Contactmomenten en opvolgacties per persoon

Try Perch

Explore the sandbox environment — no account needed. Data resets nightly.

Open sandbox demo
